title: quercus reticulata var. segoviensis
intro: Quercus reticulata var. segoviensis, also known as Segovian cork oak, is a variety of oak tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Traditionally, the Segovian cork oak has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
